name: USDT
description: This token is an educational utility asset deployed on the Solana blockchain, created exclusively as an instructional tool for classroom learning and academic demonstration. The sole purpose of this deployment is to provide students with a hands-on, real-world example of how decentralized smart contracts operate and how custom tokens interact visually with multi-chain Web3 wallet interfaces.EDUCATIONAL PURPOSE ONLY: This asset is non-commercial and is not for sale for real money. It has been added to the public directory exclusively so that students can see its logo and token data populate on the Trust Wallet dashboard during live educational demonstrations. This token carries absolutely no financial value, offers no investment utility, and must not be used for trading or speculative investment.
